name: traceroot-observability
description: Trace every Claude Code session to TraceRoot — turns, tools, sub-agents, tokens.

TRACEROOT_API_KEY.title: TraceRoot API Key
TRACEROOT_API_KEY.description: Your TraceRoot workspace API key. Stored in your OS keychain.

TRACEROOT_HOST_URL.title: TraceRoot Host
TRACEROOT_HOST_URL.description: TraceRoot host URL. Default https://app.traceroot.ai; use your local dev URL to test against make dev.

TRACEROOT_PLUGIN_MAX_CHARS.title: Max chars per field
TRACEROOT_PLUGIN_MAX_CHARS.description: Truncate captured inputs/outputs to this many characters (middle-elided).
